hero.subtitle: Join the premium fitness experience. Certified trainers, state-of-the-art equipment, and a community that pushes you further.

about.description: At 26fitnessClub, we believe in pushing boundaries. Our premium facility offers everything you need to transform your body and mind in an aesthetic, mood-lit environment.

programs.title: Strength Training
programs.description: Build muscle mass and increase your raw strength with our heavy lifting program.

programs.title: CrossFit
programs.description: High-intensity functional movements designed to push your cardiovascular endurance.

programs.title: Personal Training
programs.description: 1-on-1 coaching customized completely to your unique fitness goals.

programs.title: Yoga & Mobility
programs.description: Improve flexibility, balance, and mental focus with our expert-led yoga sessions.

programs.title: Cardio Fitness
programs.description: Optimized routines using modern cardio equipment to maximize calorie burn.

programs.title: Weight Loss
programs.description: Structured programs integrating workout, nutrition, and recovery for effective results.

videoGallery.title: Beast Mode: Full Body Workout
videoGallery.description: Follow along with Elite Trainer Marcus for a high-intensity full body smash session.

videoGallery.title: Advanced HIIT Cardio
videoGallery.description: Burn maximum calories in minimum time with this intense 20-minute guided cardio routine.

videoGallery.title: Master the Deadlift
videoGallery.description: Learn the perfect form to prevent injury and lift heavier in this detailed tutorial.

videoGallery.title: 10-Minute Core Crunch
videoGallery.description: A quick, equipment-free core routine you can do anywhere to build functional strength.
